dependencies.name: qtbase
dependencies.reason: The Experimental notification presentation adapter directly uses system Qt Core. Qt 6.4 is a declared build constraint for the common API subset, not yet a verified supported minimum; Gentoo 6.11.1 supplies current component evidence.

dependencies.name: qtdeclarative
dependencies.reason: The Experimental notification card and list module directly use system QML, Qt Quick, and Quick Controls. Qt 6.4 is a declared common-API build constraint, not yet a verified supported minimum; Gentoo 6.11.1-r1 supplies current component evidence.

dependencies.name: libxcb
dependencies.reason: The passive notification presentation adapter deliberately has no X11 dependency; production shell-window linkage remains unimplemented and unmeasured.

unresolved.reason: The Qt adapter and visible synthetic-card QML module are implemented, but the complete shell executable, resolved production theme adapter, direct and transitive runtime closure, and supported minimum versions still require measurement.
AT-SPI behavior was observed in the spike, but production accessibility linkage and packaging must be measured before declaration.
